name: tracekit
description: Span-tree tracer for condukt runs: record one run's interpreterâ†’workerâ†’verifier phases as a parent-linked span tree (phase, model, ms, cost, status), render it with `tracekit trace <RID>`, and export OpenTelemetry GenAI-semconv JSON.
